skills.name: Portal
skills.description: Memorize your current location or create a portal for you or your party members to be able to use. If a location is being saved, it records the coordinates of your current position before going on cooldown, you must wait for the cooldown to end before you are then able to open a portal.
skills.effect_text:
Saveable Portals: CaptionRatio
Portal Cooldown: CaptionTime minutes
Portal Duration: 15 seconds

skills.name: Micro Dimension
skills.description: Distorts the space into a small size to deal damage to enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Ultimate Dimension
skills.description: Distorts the space into a large size to deal damage to enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.3 seconds
Target: CaptionRatio2
Duration: 1.5 seconds

skills.name: Blink
skills.description: Teleport yourself to a random location, leaving behind an apparition. The apparition remains for a period of time and receives damage from the monsters in your stead and moves along with your party members.
skills.effect_text:
Apparition Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Maximum Distance: CaptionRatio
Follows party members within 100 units of range.

skills.name: Missile Hole
skills.description: For a period of time, grants an effect that can minimize damage from missile attacks and magic bullet attacks for you and your party members.

skills.name: Portal Shop
skills.description: Open a shop to open a Portal. By learning the Portal skill, allies can move to locations that you have saved.
skills.effect_text: Up to 3 saved locations may be used

skills.name: Dimension Compression
skills.description: Compresses the space around a single enemy, dealing damage. Nearby enemies are pulled in.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Maximum Casting Time: 1 second
Maximum number of enemies gathered: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Hole of Darkness
skills.description: Summons a hole on the ground that deals Dark-property damage. Damages the enemy while the hole lasts.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time: 1 second
Magic Circle Duration: 3 seconds
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio
[Blind] Duration: 15 seconds

attributes.name: Portal: Extra Slots
attributes.description: * Increases portal slots by +1

attributes.name: Micro Dimension: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Micro Dimension] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ultimate Dimension: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Ultimate Dimension] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Micro Dimension: Confusion
attributes.description:
* Grants [Micro Dimension] a 5% chance per attribute level to inflict enemies with [Confusion] debuff for 3 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Blink: Duration
attributes.description:
* Increases [Blink]'s apparition duration by 1 second per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Micro Dimension: Duplicate
attributes.description:
* Creates a copy of ally installations within the range of [Micro Dimension]

* Cloned targets will not be further duplicated

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Ultimate Dimension: Enlarged Magic Circle
attributes.description:
* Increases the range of ally magic circles and continuous area effect skills within the range of [Ultimate Dimension] by 10%

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Dimension Compression: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dimension Compression] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Micro Dimension: After Effects
attributes.description:
* For struck enemies, the compressed area expands rapidly,

[Micro Dimension] damage hits 1 additional time after 1.5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Ultimate Dimension: After Effects
attributes.description:
* Struck enemies receive [Slow] debuff for [attribute level x1] seconds

Receives [Ultimate Dimension] damage every 0.5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Missile Hole: Escape
attributes.description:
* Activating [Missile Hole] sets your movement speed to 60 for 3 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Blink: Looming
attributes.description:
* Doubles the threat values of your [Blink] apparition

* Increases cooldown by 10 seconds

attributes.name: Hole of Darkness: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hole of Darkness] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Portal: Extra Slots
attributes.description: * Increases portal slots by +1

attributes.name: Portal: Extra Slots
attributes.description: * Increases portal slots by +1

attributes.name: Dimension Compression: Aftermath
attributes.description:
* Grants [Dimension Compression] a 10% chance per attribute level to inflict enemies with [Stun] for 1.5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Sage: Maestro of Dimension
attributes.description: * Increases damage against enemies by 10% per attribute level when using non-property attacks

attributes.name: [Arts] Dimension Compression: Gravity Sphere
attributes.description:
* Fire a black sphere in the direction the caster is facing

* The sphere lasts for 5 seconds, moving slowly while pulling in enemies

* Gives damage to the enemy once when pulling over a certain distance

attributes.name: [Arts] Missile Hole: Master of Dimensions
attributes.description:
* Store the damage taken from missile attacks and deal back 50% of the total damage to all nearby enemies when [Missile Hole] ends

* Increases the cooldown by 45 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Micro Dimension: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Micro Dimension] by 1.25% per attribute level
